title: Blue Skies - Farmer's Delight - Bark Cutting Compat
description: Adds Compatibility Between Blue Skies & Farmer's Delight
body:
Adds Support Between [Blue Skies](https://modrinth.com/mod/blue-skies) & [Farmer's Delight!](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)

[CurseForge Version Here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/blue-skies-farmers-delight-bark-cutting-compat)

Normally, when you try to cut modded wood types with a cutting board, a message appears saying, 'Doesn't seem cuttable...' However, with this datapack, it simply cuts the wood and gives you bark!

Both Mods Are Required!

Types:

- Bluebright,

- Comet,

- Dusk,

- Frostbright,

- Lunar,

- Maple,

- Starlit.

All Types have,

- Door,

- Hanging Sign,

- Log,

- Sign,

- Trapdoor,

- And Wood Types!

# THIS IS A DATAPACK!

How to Download:

1. Download the file.

2. Add it to the datapacks folder or use a loader (links below).

3. Start your world.

Links:

- [Paxi](https://modrinth.com/mod/paxi)

- [Open Loader](https://modrinth.com/mod/open-loader)

- [Global Packs](https://modrinth.com/mod/globalpacks)


Note: There is currently a compatibility issue with [Oh The Biomes We've Gone](https://modrinth.com/datapack/otbwg-farmers-delight-bark-cutting-compat), [Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/datapack/farmers-cutting-biomes-o-plenty) and [Regions Unexplored](https://modrinth.com/datapack/regions-unexplored-farmers-delight-bark-cutting-compat). I'm trying my best, but i dont know how to fix the issue!
